messages.subject: [RsR] CRAN task view "robust"
messages.body_plain:
Dear "Robustniks",

many moons ago I had promised to create a CRAN Task view
on the topic of robust statistics in R.

Actually I have fulfilled the promise quite a while ago,
but it seems I've never announce it here, and now do so :

Please look at 
   
    http://cran.ch.r-project.org/CRAN/web/views/Robust.html
		^^
		put your favorite CRAN mirror here, or just drop '.ch'

and please don't feel shy to propose improvements.
(If your critique is very harsh, you may consider replying to me
 privately instead to all of R-SIG-robust (and its archives) ;-)
 
Regards,
Martin Maechler, ETH Zurich

>>>>> "DT" == Diman Todorov <diman.todorov at gmail.com>
>>>>>     on Mon, 4 Aug 2008 12:48:28 +0200 writes:

    DT> Dear "Robustnik",
    >> Please look at

    >> http://cran.ch.r-project.org/CRAN/web/views/Robust.html
    >> ^^ put your favorite CRAN mirror here, or just drop '.ch'

    >> and please don't feel shy to propose improvements.  (If
    >> your critique is very harsh, you may consider replying to
    >> me privately instead to all of R-SIG-robust (and its
    >> archives) ;-)

    DT> I will take you at your word and propose an improvement.

    DT> The URL you gave currently leads to a 404 error message.

:-)

Yes, silly me, I've left an extra '/CRAN' in the above URL.

The correct one is

    http://cran.ch.r-project.org/web/views/Robust.html
                ^^ put your favorite CRAN mirror here, or just drop '.ch'

...
ok, waiting for more critique  ;-)
Martin.

    DT> regards Diman Todorov, University of Vienna

    DT> 	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [RsR] CRAN task view "robust"
messages.body_plain:
Diman Todorov wrote

> The URL you gave currently 
> leads to a 404 error message.

Try this:
 - Go to http://cran.r-project.org/mirrors.html
 - Copy/paste to your browser address bar the 
   html address of your mirror of choice.
 - Append to it this: /web/views/Robust.html
 - Hit 'enter'.

-----Original Message-----
From: r-sig-robust-bounces at r-project.org
[mailto:r-sig-robust-bounces at r-project.org] On Behalf Of Diman Todorov
Sent: Monday, August 04, 2008 5:48 AM
To: Martin Maechler; R-SIG-robust at stat.math.ethz.ch
Subject: Re: [RsR] CRAN task view "robust"

Dear "Robustnik",


> Please look at
>
>    http://cran.ch.r-project.org/CRAN/web/views/Robust.html
>                ^^
>                put your favorite CRAN mirror here, or just drop '.ch'

I looked at .ch. and no .ch.


> and please don't feel shy to propose improvements.
> (If your critique is very harsh, you may consider replying to me
>  privately instead to all of R-SIG-robust (and its archives) ;-)

I will take  you at your word and propose an improvement.

The URL you gave currently leads to a 404 error message.

regards
Diman Todorov, University of Vienna
